ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorites" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite */,
  "nametype" TEXT /* Type of name validity (Valid/Invalid) */,
  "recclass" TEXT /* Classification of the meteorite */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the meteorite in grams */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Indicates whether the meteorite fell or was found */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the meteorite's fall or discovery */,
  "reclat" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "reclong" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates in a formatted string */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meteorite */,
  "donation_status" INTEGER /* Status of the meteorite donation (true/false) */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the meteorite was donated */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector */,
  "discoverer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discoverer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_discoverer_id FOREIGN KEY ("discoverer_id") REFERENCES discoverers ("discoverer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_recclass FOREIGN KEY ("recclass") REFERENCES classifications ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorites_fall FOREIGN KEY ("fall") REFERENCES falls ("fall_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification (e.g., L5, H6) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the classification (e.g., Chondrite, Achondrite) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the classification (e.g., Ordinary, Carbonaceous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "falls" (
  "fall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fall record */,
  "fall_type" TEXT /* Type of fall (e.g., Fell, Found) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fall event */,
  "fall_date" TEXT /* Date of the fall event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fall_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocations" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation entry */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite associated with this location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Formatted string of the geographical coordinates */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the meteorite's location */,
  "geolocation_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the geolocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocations_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discoverers" (
  "discoverer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discoverer */,
  "discoverer_name" TEXT /* Name of the discoverer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the discoverer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the discoverer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discoverer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the meteorite */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the meteorite record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scientific_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite associated with this analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., isotopic, mineralogical) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scientific_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scientific_analysis_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_meteorites" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated research project */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated meteorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_meteorites_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_meteorites_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite associated with this image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the meteorite image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., photo, drawing) */,
  "captured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who captured the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorite_images_meteorite_id FOREIGN KEY ("meteorite_id") REFERENCES meteorites ("meteorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorite_images_captured_by FOREIGN KEY ("captured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
